name: BetaPro Natural Gas Leveraged Daily Bull ETF
summary: BetaPro Natural Gas Leveraged Daily Bull ETF is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by Horizons ETFs Management (Canada) Inc. The fund invests in the commodity markets. It takes long positions and uses derivatives such as futures to invest in natural gas. The fund seeks to track twice the daily performance of the Horizons Natural Gas Rolling Futures Index. BetaPro Natural Gas Leveraged Daily Bull ETF was formed on January 15, 2008 and is domiciled in Canada.
